steps.t: Captain Trotter can be found in Trestlebridge. Talbot Hinton asked you to show Captain Trotter the strange potion brewed by the Orcs near Nan Wathren.
Talbot Hinton is in the stocks in Trestlebridge. You should free Talbot Hinton from his bonds, for his innocence is proven.
Talbot Hinton is in Trestlebridge. You should speak with Talbot Hinton.
Captain Trotter can be found in Trestlebridge. You should speak with Captain Trotter once more.
